name: Sait Ali UYMAZ
title: Assoc. Prof. Dr.
faculty: Faculty of Computer and Information Sciences
academicPosition: Associate Professor, Department of Computer Engineering, Faculty of Computer and Information Sciences, Konya Technical University
administrativeRoles: Director, Artificial Intelligence Application and Research Center, Konya Technical University
biography: Assoc. Prof. Dr. Sait Ali Uymaz is an academic member of the Department of Computer Engineering, Faculty of Computer and Information Sciences, at Konya Technical University. His research focuses on artificial intelligence, machine learning, deep learning, medical image analysis, federated learning, semi-supervised learning, data science, and bio-inspired optimization algorithms.

He is the developer of the Artificial Algae Algorithm, a bio-inspired metaheuristic optimization method proposed for nonlinear global optimization problems. His academic work includes applications of computational intelligence and artificial intelligence in optimization, healthcare, industrial systems, financial planning, and decision-support problems.

In addition to his academic position, he serves as the Director of the Artificial Intelligence Application and Research Center at Konya Technical University and as the Head of KTÜN AI-Lab. Through these administrative and research leadership roles, he contributes to interdisciplinary artificial intelligence studies, university-industry collaboration, applied R&D projects, and institutional AI capacity development.
